decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the closest match — same entity_name ('MTA New York City Transit'), same entity_type ('agency'). The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no different existing record is a better match.

Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the closest match — same entity_name ('New York City Department of Transportation'), same entity_type ('agency'). The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no different existing record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)
